items.headline: Mixed-use housing project approved at East Middlefield Road
items.summary: City Council gave second reading approval to a mixed-use residential development at 490 East Middlefield Road, moving it toward final adoption. This project will add housing to Mountain View's commercial corridor.

items.headline: Mountain View applies for state housing incentive funding
items.summary: The city submitted an application for California's Prohousing Incentive Program Round 4, which provides grants to cities that streamline housing development. If approved, this could accelerate housing projects and reduce approval timelines.

items.headline: City seeks public input on 2026-27 housing grant spending plan
items.summary: Santa Clara is asking residents to weigh in on how it will use federal HUD housing funds for the coming fiscal year. This is your chance to influence which housing and community development projects get city resources.

items.headline: City holding public meeting on safe parking program
items.summary: Sunnyvale is hosting a community meeting on Monday, March 23 to discuss a safe parking program. This likely addresses where homeless individuals can park overnight safely, a growing concern in Bay Area cities.

items.headline: Santa Clara reviewing Station Area land use and design rules
items.summary: The Station Area Task Force is reviewing how development will be guided near the transit station, including land use rules and design standards. This affects what kind of projects can be built and how they'll look in that area.
